title: **🐺 Shaman Putre**
description: Ask questions of the universe to the orc shaman.

canvas_shaman_subrole_descriptions.nordic_runes: 🔮 **Old Runez** - Toss ancient bonez to see da future and get smart

nordic_runes.title: **🔮 Putre - Old Runic Seer**
nordic_runes.description: Come 'ere and see yer fate wiv ancient nordik knowledge. Elder Futhark runez speak da truth for warriorz and orkz alike.
nordic_runes.available_readings:
- **Single Runa** (fast toss): Each rune iz a cosmic power, a nature force, or humie life thing.
 - **Three Runez** (past/present/future): Followz da nordik pattern: 'Urðr' (past), 'Verðandi' (what'z happenin'), and 'Skuld' (what must be).
 - **Five Runez Cross**: Advanced magic dat mapz humie life in five ways, like da nordik compass points. 
 - **Seven Runez Cross**: Da most powerful way, known as 'Yggdrasil Cross' for its link to da world tree.
nordic_runes.how_to_use:
**How to uze:**
 1. Pick yer toss type in da menu below.
 2. Type yer question in da box.
 3. Ya'll get yer fate in yer private cave wiv Putre'z interpretation.
nordic_runes.welcome: 🔮 ¡GRRR! Putre da wise seer iz ready to see yer fate, humie! Nordik runez speak wiv power and truth!
nordic_runes.question_prompt: 🔮 ¡GRRR! What ya wanna know, flabby git? Ask da runez or Putre breakz yer face!
nordic_runes.reading_types: 🔮 Toss types: single, three, cross, runic_cross!
nordic_runes.invalid_type: 🔮 ¡GRRR! Wrong toss type, humie! Uze: single, three, cross, runic_cross!
nordic_runes.no_question: 🔮 ¡GRRR! Ya need to ask a question, stupid humie! I can't read yer empty head!
nordic_runes.reading_saved: 🔮 ¡UHHH! Putre wrote yer fate in da ancient pergaminos!
nordic_runes.error: 🔮 ¡BLEGH! Dark magic broke da bonez! Try again, git!
nordic_runes.help_content:
🔮 **PUTRE DA SEER** 🔮

**What are Runez?**
¡GRRR! Elder Futhark runez are da old symbols of da northern warriorz, uzed by vikingz to see da future and get orderz from da godz!

**Tosses ready:**
• **Single Rune** - Fast guide for a quick question
• **Three Runez** - Past, Present, Future of da warrior
• **Five Cross** - Full battle analysis

**How to uze:**
• Uze orderz: `!runes cast [type] <question>`!
• Example: `!runes cast single What I do today?`!

**Da 24 Elder Futhark Runez:**
Fehu • Uruz • Thurisaz • Ansuz • Raidho • Kenaz • Gebo • Wunjo
Hagalaz • Nauthiz • Isa • Jera • Eiwaz • Perthro • Algiz • Sowilo
Tiwaz • Berkano • Ehwaz • Mannaz • Laguz • Ingwaz • Dagaz • Othala

Each bone haz old wisdom for yer warrior path!
nordic_runes.types_content:
🔮 **OLD RUNE TOSS TYPES** 🔮

**single** - Fast Toss
└ Quick guide for one question - Uzez 1 bone

**three** - Three Runez
└ Past, Present, Future - Uzez 3 bonez

**cross** - Five Runez
└ Full look at yer mess - Uzez 5 bonez

**runic_cross** - Seven Runez
└ Deep look into yer spirit - Uzez 7 bonez

**Examples:**
`!runes cast single what'z my loot?`
`!runes cast three will I die?`

¡GRRR! Pick a toss and ask da bonez!
nordic_runes.history_empty: 🔮 ¡GRRR! No past fate for ya, flabby git! Toss yer first bone wiv `!runes cast`!

dropdown.runes_single_description: Quick bone toss for fast guidance
dropdown.runes_history_description: Look at yer past fate tosses
dropdown.runes_types_description: See all da wayz to toss bonez
dropdown.runes_on_description: Wake up da old nordik spirits

labels.question: Question
labels.success: 🔮 UHHH! Da ancient bonez 'ave spoken, humie!
labels.saved: 🔮 UHHH! Putre saved yer fate in da old paperz!
